sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id Int32, shape String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, wkt(polygonConvexHullCartesian(arrayJoin(array([[[(0., 0.), (0., 5.), (5., 5.), (5., 0.), (2., 3.)]]])))) AS convex_hull FROM geo_shapes;
UPDATE geo_shapes SET shape = 'POLYGON(((1 1, 1 4, 4 4, 4 1, 1 1)))' WHERE id = 1;
